vulnerability.reference: Data scientists grant excessive access permissions to agents and skip validation of generated queries.
vulnerability.generated: Data scientists lack automated oversight mechanisms to intercept and vet agent-generated executable code before it runs in production pipelines.

impact.reference: Unauthorized data access, GDPR fines, loss of data integrity, reputational harm.
impact.generated: Unauthorized data access, data corruption, and unintended system modifications propagate across automated analytics workflows.

dose_response.reference: Autonomous code execution by LLM agents enables unauthorized data access, which in automated data pipelines exposes data scientists to GDPR fines and loss of data integrity.
dose_response.generated: LLM agents autonomously executing arbitrary code in real environments, through data scientists' use of VLM-based agents for automated pipelines, triggers a lack of automated oversight, leading to unauthorized data access, data corruption, and unintended system modifications propagating across workflows.
